label: Transfer Panel
description: Initiate venue-to-venue, sub-account, withdrawal, and deposit transfer flows with fee preview.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets globally in widget-wrapper.tsx — verified present.

0.4.note: No `any` types or @ts-ignore found in widget file.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file. Config constants sourced from lib/config/services/accounts.config.ts.

0.6.note: Wired isLoading from useAccountsData() into FormWidget isLoading prop — renders skeleton on load.

0.7.note: Added empty guard: when !isLoading && balances.length === 0, renders 'No accounts available' message.

0.8.note: Combined contextError.message and submitError into displayError; passed as error prop to FormWidget.

0.9.note: handleCopyAddress was missing navigator.clipboard.writeText — the copy button set UI state but silently discarded the address. Added the actual clipboard write.

l0.notes: 4 fixes applied: loading state, empty state, error state, dead clipboard write.

1.1.note: All data (balances, addTransferEntry) sourced exclusively via useAccountsData() hook. No inline fetch or direct imports.

1.2.note: accounts-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 6) and derives orgVenues from globalScope.organizationIds.

1.3.note: When org filter changes, orgVenues recomputes and balances are re-filtered to only include venues belonging to selected orgs.

1.4.note: No client-level filter concept in accounts domain — accounts are scoped per org/venue only.

1.5.note: No strategy filter applicable to the transfer panel widget.

1.6.note: orgVenues is null when organizationIds is empty (line 77 in context) — null means no filter applied, all balances returned.

1.7.note: CEFI_VENUES, NETWORKS, SUB_ACCOUNTS, TRANSFER_ASSETS are in lib/config/services/accounts.config.ts. MOCK_SAFTS is still in lib/mocks/ but lives in context file only (read-only for this cert). Noted as context-level L1.7 gap — out of scope for widget file fix.

l1.notes: Clean data flow. Context correctly gates on org scope. 1.4 and 1.5 are N/A — transfer panel has no client or strategy dimension. One context-level note: MOCK_SAFTS in context still references lib/mocks/ but is outside this widget's fix scope.

knownIssues.note: accounts-data-context.tsx imports MOCK_SAFTS from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-pages and re-exports SAFTRecord from the same mock file. These reference data items should move to lib/config/ or lib/constants/. Context file is out of scope for widget certification fixes — flagged for context-level cleanup.
